ag-ask.template:
Ask a question about the current project's codebase via the antigravity knowledge hub.

Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

See .opencode/commands/ag-ask.md for full instructions.

Prefer `ag-ask` over manual file search.
ag-ask.description: Ask a question about the current project's codebase via the antigravity knowledge hub

ag-refresh.template:
Rebuild the antigravity project knowledge base after significant changes.

Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

See .opencode/commands/ag-refresh.md for full instructions.
ag-refresh.description: Rebuild the antigravity project knowledge base after significant changes

ag-init.template:
Scaffold a new multi-agent repository from the Antigravity template.

Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

See .opencode/commands/ag-init.md for full instructions.
ag-init.description: Scaffold a new multi-agent repository from the Antigravity template

ag-setup.template:
First-time setup for Antigravity. Configure the LLM API key used to read and analyze your codebase.

Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

See .opencode/commands/ag-setup.md for full instructions.
ag-setup.description: First-time setup for Antigravity LLM API key configuration
